title: Surface Lush Caves
description: A silly mod that adds the "Lush Plains" biome, which contains Lush Cave generation features on the surface.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kRBjzryX9L4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A silly mod that adds the "Lush Plains" biome, which contains Lush Cave generation features on the surface.

Have you ever wanted the delightful clay-and-moss formations on the surface of the world? Well, now there's a biome for that! Additionally, you will usually find Lush Caves underneath this biome.
